hero.titel: Precision Injection Moulding for Technical Plastic Components
hero.subtitel: From small prototype to series production — we deliver technical plastic components that fit, work and last. Fast delivery, competitive pricing.

voordelen.tekst: Minimum order quantity of 1 piece. Ideal for R&D, replacement parts and niche products with high dimensional tolerances.
Thanks to our in-house mould shop and flexible production capacity, we guarantee shorter lead times than the market standard.
Our technical team advises on material selection, mould design and assembly — from drawing to final product in one hand.

over.tekst: Plastic Industrie Utrecht BV has been operating for over 25 years and has grown into a trusted partner for technical companies throughout the Benelux and beyond.

testimonials.quote: PIU consistently delivers high quality with lead times that surpass every other supplier. Our go-to for complex plastic components.
The combination of SLS printing and injection moulding under one roof saves us months in the development cycle. Exceptional technical expertise.
Small series, fast delivery, fair pricing. PIU is the partner we had been looking for. No surprises, always on time.

cta.tekst: Upload your drawing or describe your project. We respond within one business day.
